Prevents race conditions where the default changes between transaction submission and execution.","projectId":"The ID of the project to lock the terminal for."}},"migrateBalanceOf(uint256,address,address)":{"params":{"projectId":"Unused.","to":"Unused.","token":"Unused."},"returns":{"_0":"balance Always 0."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"pay(uint256,address,uint256,address,uint256,string,bytes)":{"details":"Uses the project-specific terminal when set, otherwise falls back to `defaultTerminal`.","params":{"amount":"The amount of tokens to send.","beneficiary":"The address that will receive any project tokens minted by the destination.","memo":"A memo to pass along to the emitted event.","metadata":"Bytes in `JBMetadataResolver`'s format (may include `permit2` allowance data).","minReturnedTokens":"The minimum number of project tokens expected in return.","projectId":"The ID of the project to pay.","token":"The address of the token to pay with."},"returns":{"result":"The number of project tokens minted for the beneficiary."}},"previewPayFor(uint256,address,uint256,address,bytes)":{"details":"Uses the project-specific terminal when set, otherwise falls back to `defaultTerminal`.","params":{"amount":"The amount of the input token to preview.","beneficiary":"The address that would receive any minted project tokens.","metadata":"Extra data to forward unchanged to the resolved terminal preview.","projectId":"The ID of the project to pay.","token":"The token to pay into the resolved terminal."},"returns":{"beneficiaryTokenCount":"The number of project tokens the beneficiary would receive.","hookSpecifications":"Any pay hook specifications returned by the resolved terminal.","reservedTokenCount":"The number of project tokens that would be reserved.","ruleset":"The ruleset the resolved terminal would use for the preview."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setDefaultTerminal(address)":{"details":"Only the registry owner can call this. Automatically allowlists the new default. The very first call also maps every project that already existed onto the new default (via a history segment) so those pre-existing projects — including the canonical fee project (ID 1) — can route tokens through it. Existing projects (ID <= current `PROJECTS.count()` at call time) keep their historical default on later changes — the previous `defaultTerminal` is pushed onto `_defaultTerminalHistory` so fall-through resolution for those projects continues to return what was current when their cohort was last addressed. This means a later default change never silently reroutes payments for already-deployed projects that never set an explicit `_terminalOf` override.","params":{"terminal":"The terminal to set as the default for future projects."}},"setTerminalFor(uint256,address)":{"details":"Only the project's owner or an address with the `JBPermissionIds.SET_ROUTER_TERMINAL` permission can set.","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to set the terminal for.","terminal":"The terminal to set for the project."}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"params":{"interfaceId":"The interface ID to check."},"returns":{"supported":"Whether `interfaceId` is implemented."}},"terminalOf(uint256)":{"params":{"projectId":"The project whose downstream terminal should be resolved."},"returns":{"terminal":"The concrete terminal the forwarder would call for `projectId`."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"trustedForwarder()":{"details":"Returns the address of the trusted forwarder."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"PERMISSIONS()":{"notice":"A contract storing permissions."},"PERMIT2()":{"notice":"The Permit2 contract used for token approvals and transfers."},"PROJECTS()":{"notice":"The Juicebox project registry used to verify project existence and ownership."},"accountingContextForTokenOf(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Get the accounting context for the specified project ID and token."},"accountingContextsOf(uint256)":{"notice":"Return all the accounting contexts for a specified project ID."},"addAccountingContextsFor(uint256,(address,uint8,uint32)[])":{"notice":"Empty implementation to satisfy the interface."},"addToBalanceOf(uint256,address,uint256,bool,string,bytes)":{"notice":"Add funds to a project's balance by forwarding them through the project's resolved router terminal."},"allowTerminal(address)":{"notice":"Add a terminal to the allowlist so projects can select it as their router."},"constructor":{"notice":"Construct a router-terminal registry."},"currentSurplusOf(uint256,address[],uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Always returns 0 because the registry only forwards funds and does not hold project balances."},"defaultTerminal()":{"notice":"The current default terminal — applied to projects with ID strictly greater than `defaultTerminalProjectIdThreshold`. Existing projects (ID <= threshold) without an explicit terminal continue to resolve against the historical default that was current at the time their project ID range was active (see `_defaultTerminalHistory`)."},"defaultTerminalFor(uint256)":{"notice":"The default terminal that applies to a given project on fall-through, accounting for the threshold and the snapshot history. Returns zero if no default ever applied to the project's ID range."},"defaultTerminalHistoryAt(uint256)":{"notice":"Read a default-terminal history entry. Exposes the internal append-only history."},"defaultTerminalHistoryLength()":{"notice":"The total number of historical default-terminal snapshots captured (= number of `setDefaultTerminal` calls after the very first one)."},"defaultTerminalProjectIdThreshold()":{"notice":"The `PROJECTS.count()` snapshot at the moment of the last `setDefaultTerminal` call. Projects with `ID <= defaultTerminalProjectIdThreshold` (i.e. already existing when the most recent default was set) DO NOT pick up `defaultTerminal` on fall-through; instead they resolve against the historical entry in `_defaultTerminalHistory` that covers their ID. The first default's segment covers every project that already existed when it was set (so those projects route through it), while later segments pin each outgoing default to its own cohort. This prevents the registry owner from silently rerouting payments for already-deployed projects via a later default change."},"disallowTerminal(address)":{"notice":"Remove a terminal from the allowlist so no new projects can select it."},"hasLockedTerminal(uint256)":{"notice":"Whether the terminal for a given project has been locked against future updates."},"isTerminalAllowed(address)":{"notice":"Whether a terminal is allowlisted for project-level selection."},"lockTerminalFor(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Permanently lock a project's router terminal choice so it can never be changed again."},"migrateBalanceOf(uint256,address,address)":{"notice":"Always returns 0 because the registry holds no project balances to migrate."},"originalPayer()":{"notice":"The original payer of the current transaction."},"pay(uint256,address,uint256,address,uint256,string,bytes)":{"notice":"Pay a project by accepting the caller's tokens and forwarding them to the project's resolved router terminal."},"previewPayFor(uint256,address,uint256,address,bytes)":{"notice":"Preview a payment by forwarding the call to the terminal currently resolved for the project."},"setDefaultTerminal(address)":{"notice":"Change the registry-wide default terminal for projects created AFTER this
